title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 5 - Communicating (live, unedited)
summary: CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence Chapter 5 covers communicating concepts and techniques in AI. The course is offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School. It is led by Brian Yu with coordination by David J. Malan.
writeup: This CS50 session is Chapter 5 of Introduction to Artificial Intelligence, led by Brian Yu with coordination by David J. Malan, and it covers communicating concepts and techniques in AI. The recording is presented live and unedited. The course is offered through edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School.
